case_title: CHAVEZ MARGARITA VS GAMERO ROBERTO ANTONIO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,835.91 FILED BY CHAVEZ MARGARITA AS TO DEFENDANT GAMERO ROBERTO ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
